title: The Map in the Attic
synopsis: A dusty attic box leads to a small mystery and a fun afternoon of searching.
sentences: During a rainy weekend, Sam helped his aunt clear old boxes from the attic.
Most boxes held books, toys, and winter coats.
But one small wooden box held a folded map tied with string.
The paper was old and marked with a red X near the garden shed.
Sam's aunt laughed and said the map must be from a game her father once made.
Still, both of them became curious.
They carried the map downstairs and compared it with the garden outside.
The shapes on the paper matched the tree, the shed, and the stone path.
Sam counted his steps and stopped beside the shed exactly where the red X pointed.
Under a loose stone, he found a tiny metal box.
Inside was an old coin and a note that said, "Well done, explorer."
Sam grinned and decided that rainy days could hide good surprises.
